description: A VOD asset is found to have a corrupted video file. An agent must replace it with a corrected version from the production house.

nodes.task_description: Identify the VOD asset with the corrupted file.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the specific asset in the management system.

nodes.task_description: Request a new, corrected file from the content partner.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends a formal request for re-delivery.

nodes.task_description: Ingest the new file and run it through automated QC.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent ingests the new file, and it passes the QC scan.

nodes.task_description: Replace the corrupted file with the new file on the streaming servers.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the VOD asset.
